name: art-style-creator
description: Create and define visual art styles for projects. Use when user wants to establish an art direction, create a style guide, define visual language, document aesthetic choices, or create consistent artwork guidelines for games, illustrations, animations, or other visual media.
capabilities: Guides users through 10-step art style creation workflow
Generates comprehensive style documentation with templates
Provides color theory, composition, and lighting reference materials
Includes technical specifications for different output media
Offers genre-specific style presets (Anime, Cartoon, Realistic, etc.)
Creates reusable style guides for collaborative teams
author: CesarAugustusGroB
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill containing art education content. No executable code, network calls, or file system access. Static findings are false positives from markdown formatting and ASCII diagrams being misidentified as code patterns.
valueStatement: Defining a consistent visual style is essential for project cohesion, yet many creators struggle to articulate their aesthetic vision. This skill provides a structured 10-step framework to create detailed art style guides covering color theory, line work, shapes, composition, lighting, and technical specifications.
limitations: Does not generate actual artwork or images
Requires user input for project-specific decisions
Style guides need manual implementation by artists
No integration with design software or graphics tools

useCases.title: Define game visual identity
useCases.description: Create art style guides ensuring consistent visuals across characters, environments, and UI elements.

useCases.title: Develop artistic style
useCases.description: Systematically explore and document visual preferences for a cohesive personal art style.

useCases.title: Build team style guidelines
useCases.description: Create detailed style bibles that multiple artists can follow for visual consistency.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Style Creation
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me create an art style for my fantasy illustration project. I want something whimsical but not childish with a painterly feel.

promptTemplates.title: Game Art Direction
promptTemplates.prompt: I need an art style guide for a cozy farming simulation game. Target audience is casual players who enjoy games like Stardew Valley.

promptTemplates.title: Brand Visual Identity
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a comprehensive art style for my eco-friendly brand that needs illustrations for web, print, and social media.

promptTemplates.title: Animation Style Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Develop a detailed animation art style for a sci-fi comedy series. It should be expressive but production-friendly for a small team.

bestPractices: Reference existing styles as starting points but modify to create uniqueness
Document specific measurements and technical details for team consistency
Create do's and don'ts sections with visual examples for clarity
Test style guide with multiple artists to ensure interpretability
antiPatterns: Copying popular styles exactly without adaptation or unique elements
Creating overly complex style guides that are difficult to follow
Ignoring technical constraints of target platform or medium
Skipping the mood and emotional tone definition phase

faq.question: Can this skill generate actual artwork?
faq.answer: No, this skill creates written style guides and documentation only. It defines visual direction but produces no artwork.

faq.question: Is this suitable for 3D projects?
faq.answer: The principles apply to both 2D and 3D, but templates are optimized for 2D visual styles. 3D projects may need additional specs.

faq.question: How detailed should my project description be?
faq.answer: Start with basic project type, target audience, and 3-5 descriptive words. The skill guides you through specific details.

faq.question: Can I use this for existing projects?
faq.answer: Yes, analyze existing work to identify patterns, then document them using templates to create formal style guides.

faq.question: What if I am unsure about my visual preferences?
faq.answer: The skill includes genre presets and reference materials. Start with these foundations and modify based on what resonates.

faq.question: How does this compare to hiring an art director?
faq.answer: This skill creates documentation an art director would produce, but artistic skill is still needed to implement the style.
